settings.heading: Wooden Memento Design Ideas
settings.subheading: Warm, premium wooden memento designs — engraved plaques, wood-acrylic combos, photo mementos and laser-cut shapes for felicitations, retirements and corporate gifts. By Meru Trophy.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: Popular wooden memento designs include engraved plaques, wood-and-acrylic layered pieces, photo wood mementos and laser-cut shapes — warm, premium and eco-friendly. Add name, occasion, date and logo. Meru Trophy makes any of these from ₹250. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: Ideas that work
settings.text: Wood gives mementos warmth and a premium, tactile feel. Modern designs pair wood with acrylic or metal accents; classic ones use clean laser-engraved plaques. Wood also takes UV-printed photos and logos beautifully — ideal for felicitations, retirements and eco-conscious corporate gifts.

settings.heading: Popular designs
settings.text:
• Classic engraved plaque — name, citation and logo on natural wood.
  • Wood + acrylic layer — contemporary corporate look.
  • Photo wood memento — UV-printed photo with engraved message.
  • Laser-cut shape — custom silhouette (map, logo, emblem).
  • Wood + metal plate — engraved metal on a wooden base.
  • Standing desk memento — compact keepsake for the recipient's desk.

settings.question: Why choose a wooden memento?
settings.answer: Warmth, a premium feel and an eco-friendly material — popular for felicitations, retirements and corporate gifts.

settings.question: Can wood have a photo and logo?
settings.answer: Yes — UV printing puts full-colour photos and logos on wood alongside engraving.

settings.question: Are modern wood designs available?
settings.answer: Yes — wood-and-acrylic and wood-and-metal combinations for a contemporary look.

settings.question: What's the starting price?
settings.answer: Wooden mementos start around ₹250, depending on size and design.

settings.heading: Like a wooden design?
settings.text: Tell us what you're planning — we'll share designs and a quote, usually within the hour.
